mapper.insert: insert into reward_ledger(id, user_id, event_id, event_type, delta, balance_after, frozen_balance_after, source_module, remark) values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{delta}, #{balanceAfter}, #{frozenBalanceAfter}, #{sourceModule}, #{remark})
